title: Crypto Industry Lobbying U.S. on Tax Clarity for Mining and Staking
summary: Major crypto advocacy groups are pushing the U.S. House tax committee to pass a bill clarifying tax rules for mining and staking. This could reduce uncertainty for crypto miners and stakers in the U.S.
body:
The crypto industry's top U.S. advocacy groups have asked the House Ways and Means Committee to advance legislation that would clarify tax treatment for assets earned through mining and staking. This push comes as the industry faces growing regulatory scrutiny and seeks to establish clearer guidelines for these activities.

The bill in question aims to address the current ambiguity around how crypto mining and staking rewards should be taxed. According to the advocacy groups, the lack of clear tax rules is creating uncertainty for both individual miners and staking participants, as well as for the broader crypto ecosystem.

For everyday crypto users, this legislative push could mean more predictable tax obligations and potentially lower compliance costs. Clearer tax rules would also encourage more participation in mining and staking, which are key activities in maintaining the security and functionality of many blockchain networks.

The industry is watching closely to see if the House committee will take up the bill, as its passage could set a precedent for future tax policies related to crypto. Users and investors should stay informed about any developments in this legislative process, as it could significantly impact their tax liabilities and participation in crypto activities.
twitterThread: Crypto miners and stakers in the U.S. could soon get clearer tax rules. Industry groups are pushing Congress to act on a new bill.
The bill aims to clarify how crypto earned from mining and staking should be taxed, reducing uncertainty for participants. This could lower compliance costs and encourage more involvement.

If passed, this bill could make crypto mining and staking more predictable for everyday users. Watch for updates from the House Ways and Means Committee. Read more → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-22-crypto-industry-lobbying-us-on-tax-clarity-for-mining-and-staking
